mtParsedPayload.documentsRequired:
1.BENEFICIARYS DRAFT DRAWN ON CITIZENS BANK INTERNATIONAL
LTD. AT SIGHT BEARING THE CLAUSE DRAWN UNDER DOCUMENTARY  
CREDIT NO.NRT7172USD65 DATED 11 MARCH 2015 ISSUED BY  
CITIZENS BANK INTERNATIONAL LTD.IN TWO COPIES.
2.MANUALLY SIGNED COMMERCIAL INVOICE IN 3 ORIGINALS AND 3
COPIES ON CIF KOLKATA,INDIA(INCOTERMS 2010)BASIS INDICATING 
COUNTRY OF ORIGIN.
3.FULL (3/3) SET OF CLEAN ON BOARD BILL OF LADING EVIDENCING
SHIPMENT FROM CHINA TO KOLKATA, INDIA IN TRANSIT TO
KATHMANDU, NEPAL VIA BIRGUNJ CUSTOMS OFFICE, BIRGUNJ,NEPAL AND 
MADE OUT TO THE ORDER OF CITIZENS BANK INTERNATIONAL LTD.
MARKED FREIGHT PREPAID AND NOTIFY APPLICANT.
4.CERTIFICATE OF ORIGIN CERTIFYING THAT GOODS ARE OF CHINA
ORIGIN IN 3 ORIGINALS AND 1 COPY ISSUED BY BENEFICIARY.
5.PACKING LIST IN 3 ORIGINALS AND 1 COPY.
6.WEIGHT LIST IN 3 ORIGINALS AND 1 COPY
7.NEGOTIABLE INSURANCE POLICY OR CERTIFICATE OF INSURANCE 
IN ALL ORIGINALS ENDORSED IN FAVOR OF CITIZENS BANK   
INTERNATIONAL LTD. FOR 110 PERCENT OF INVOICE VALUE COVERING
INSTITUTE CARGO CLAUSE A, INSTITUTE STRIKE CARGO CLAUSE,
INSTITUTE WAR CARGO CLAUSE, TPND AND SRCC UP TO KOLKATA,INDIA.
mtParsedPayload.additionalConditions:
1.ALL DOCUMENTS(EXCEPT DRAFT)REQUESTED TO BE SUBMITTED 
UNDER THIS DOCUMENTARY CREDIT MUST QUOTE ISSUING BANK NAME,
DOCUMENTARY CREDIT NO. AND DATE, HARMONIC CODE, NAME AND PAN NO.
OF THE APPLICANT. THE DATE OF ALL DOCUMENTS MUST NOT BE PRIOR TO
DATE OF ISSUE OF THIS DOCUMENTARY CREDIT AND DATE OF VALUE
AMENDMENT, IF ANY.
2.SHIPMENT TO BE MADE FROM CHINA TO KOLKATA, INDIA IN TRANSIT TO
KATHMANDU, NEPAL VIA BIRGUNJ CUSTOMS OFFICE,BIRGUNJ, NEPAL AND 
B/L TO INDICATE THIS.
3.ALL DOCUMENTS REQUESTED TO BE SUBMITTED UNDER THIS
DOCUMENTARY CREDIT MUST BE EXPRESSED IN ENGLISH LANGUAGE.
4.TOLERANCE OF PLUS/MINUS TEN PCT IN TOTAL QTY. AND VALUE
IS ALLOWED BUT UNIT PRICE SHOULD REMAIN UNCHANGED.
5.IF DOCUMENTS ARE FOUND TO BE DISCREPANT AS PER ARTICLE 16 OF
UCP 600 WE MAY GIVE ITS NOTICE OF REFUSAL AND HOLD DOCUMENTS
AT NEGOTIATING BANKS DISPOSAL.NEVERTHELESS,IF WE RECEIVE THE
WAIVER OF DISCREPANCIES FROM THE APPLICANT PRIOR TO RECEIPT OF
THE MESSAGE OF NEGOTIATING BANKS DISPOSAL OR INSTRUCTION,WE
SHALL RELEASE THE DOCUMENTS TO THE APPLICANT WITHOUT
NEGOTIATING BANKS PERMISSION AND FURTHER NOTICE TO THEM.
mtParsedPayload.periodForPresentation:
WITHIN 21 DAYS FROM SHIPMENT
DATE BUT WITHIN CREDIT EXPIRY.
mtParsedPayload.charges:
ALL CHARGES OUTSIDE NEPAL
ARE ON ACCOUNT OF BENEFICIARY.

78:
1.CERTIFYING STRICT COMPLIANCE WITH ALL TERMS AND CONDITIONS
OF THE CREDIT, PLEASE FORWARD THE ORIGINAL DOCUMENTS TO US,UPON
RECEIPT OF WHICH WE SHALL REMIT THE FUND TO YOU AS PER YOUR 
INSTRUCTION.
2. FOR EACH SET OF DISCREPANT DOCUMENTS DISCREPANCY FEE OF
USD 50.00 WILL BE DEDUCTED FROM THE PROCEEDS UPON ACCEPTANCE OF
SUCH DOCUMENTS.
3. COURIER DOCUMENTS IN TWO SETS TO CITIZENS BANK INTERNATIONAL
LTD., SHARADA SADAN, KAMALADI, KATHMANDU, NEPAL ON THE SAME DAY
OF NEGOTIATION CERTIFYING ENDORSEMENT OF THE NEGOTIATED AMOUNT
ON THE REVERSE OF THE ORIGINAL CREDIT AND INFORM US BY
SWIFT:CTZNNPKA.
